description: QuantChat Snapchat/WhatsApp-Killer Screen Depth - Enhance chat list with presence dots, swipe actions (pin/archive), unread badges. Upgrade conversation with reactions, voice notes, image messages, link previews, reply-to-message threading. Upgrade stories with full-screen vertical viewer, progress bars, tap-to-advance. Add video/voice call UI with controls.
steps: 1. Enhance apps/quantchat/src/app/page.tsx chat list: Add presence indicator dots (online=green/away=yellow/offline=gray) on avatars, swipe-left to archive with spring animation, swipe-right to pin with color highlight, long-press for context menu (mute/delete/mark-read), last-message time with relative formatting (just now, 2m, 1h, yesterday).

2. Enhance apps/quantchat/src/app/chat/[id]/page.tsx conversation: Add long-press reactions overlay (emoji picker row: like/love/laugh/sad/angry/fire), voice note recording button with waveform visualization, image/video message cards with lightbox on tap, link preview cards (title/description/thumbnail auto-detected), reply-to-specific-message with quoted preview above input, message status indicators (sent/delivered/read checkmarks).

3. Enhance apps/quantchat/src/app/stories/page.tsx and apps/quantchat/src/components/StoryViewer.tsx: Full-screen viewer with progress bar segments at top (one per story in group), tap left/right to navigate, hold to pause, swipe up to reply, swipe down to close, auto-advance timer (5s per story), story ring gradient on chat list for unseen stories.

4. Create apps/quantchat/src/app/call/page.tsx: Video/voice call UI with full-screen remote video, pip self-view, bottom control bar (mute/camera toggle/speaker/end call), incoming call overlay with accept/reject, call timer display, minimize to PiP mode button.
acceptance_criteria: Chat list shows presence dots, relative timestamps, and supports swipe gestures
Conversation page has reactions, voice note UI, image messages, link previews, and reply-to threading
Story viewer is full-screen with progress bars and tap/swipe navigation
Call page has full UI with controls for mute/camera/end
TypeScript compiles without errors for all quantchat changes
